title: phylloschoenus supinus
intro: Phylloschoenus supinus, also known as Swamp Saw-sedge, is a type of sedge plant native to tropical Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Phylloschoenus supinus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas or infusions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory and digestive issues.
